title: 6 nc Commands for Quick Port Checks
summary: Probe ports and test simple TCP or UDP connectivity with nc commands for reachability checks, listeners, short payloads, and timed connection attempts.
verification_setup: Replace the example hosts and ports before running the commands.
Check which nc variant is installed because supported flags may vary.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/nc_commands_for_quick_port_checks.sh with real local or remote targets.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Replace the example hosts and ports; UDP checks are less definitive than TCP probes.
